title: Animal house
abstract: An animal house includes an impermeable hollow-moulded structure having at least one convex surface. The structure includes a first flat surface extending in a first direction and a second flat surface extending in a second direction. The convex surface connects the first flat surface to the second flat surface. The structure further includes a rib defining a sharp edge. The rib is configured to be releasably attached proximate to or on the convex surface such that the rib diverts a liquid flowing over the convex surface away from the structure. An impermeable hollow-moulded panel with protruding ridges is also provided to prevent water ingress.
claims: 1. An impermeable hollow-moulded panel for an animal house, the impermeable hollow-moulded panel having a side panel including an inward facing surface, a first edge, and a recessed first end portion adjacent the first edge and the inward facing surface, the recessed first end portion defining a plane and having a series of protruding ridges protruding away from the plane and connected by a protruding spine protruding away from the plane, the protruding spine extending in parallel with the first edge and the series of protruding ridges extending along the recessed first end portion at an angle of between 5° and 80° down toward the first edge away from the protruding spine, wherein the ridges in the series of protruding ridges are parallel to each other, and wherein the protruding spine protrudes level with the inward facing surface of the side panel.
